resources.string: OLE初始化失败。确保OLE库是正确的版本。
空项目。使用'工作流'选项卡中的 选项添加图像，或按 F1打开应用程序帮助 以获取进一步说明。
蓝色光标视图。单击或拖动&&置入 图像或正射投影到 将其显示在此区域中。
绿色光标视图。单击一个影像 同时按住2或者拖动&&置入 一个影像在此显示
洋红色光标视图。单击一个影像 同时按住 3 或者拖动&&置入 一个影像在此显示
珊瑚色光标视图。单击一个影像 同时按住 4 或拖动&&置入 一个影像在此显示.
拖动&&置入一个影像对象从场景 显示或按住 Ctrl 并拖动&&置入一个影像从另外的 视图来在此区域显示.
某些内容无法正确渲染，因为三维渲染程序未能初始化
初始化Direct3D时失败，请切换视图方面 返回或与系统管理员联系。
由于凭证无效或过期，无法从所选地图源下载地图瓦片。
由于没有任何已分配的测量图像，因此不会使用该控制点。
Enable or disable automatic suggestion of image measurements from the 3D space.
在3D视图中启用或禁用镜头锥体渲染
16位/ HDR纹理转换为8位。 您看到的不是原始数据。
与分布式系统断开连接
深度图已损坏或丢失。 尝试再次运行模型重建。 它将尝试仅重新计算有问题的深度图。
An algorithm for mosaicing-based orthographic projection.
Unwrap failed due to unexpected mesh topology. You can try to clean your model and unwrap it again.

矫正颜色：尚不支持16-bit/HDR格式图像(计划发布于下个版本)
正在执行$(processTitle)。您可以随时在进度标签中检查/控制该过程。

This feature is not supported by your current RealityScan license. Purchase a higher tier license at www.realityscan.com/features in order to use it.

This feature was released after your maintenance program expired ($(Month)/$(Day)/$(Year)). Please contact us at https://www.realityscan.com/support to inquire about upgrading your license.
此功能是在您的维护计划过期后发布的 ($(Month)/$(Day)/$(Year))。请延长您的维护期限。
延长您的维护期限以访问此功能

取消激活当前计算机上所有用户之间共享的许可证
添加文件夹时包括所有子目录。
假设所有图像都使用相同的相机校准参数。
假设可以根据Exif图像签名将相机校准参数分组在一起。
将导入的部件复制到缓存
导入部件时，将其复制到缓存中。
关闭存储在图像元数据中的GPS位置优先级。

如果有更多部件，则停止
两种顶点颜色 & 纹理

定义所选编解码器的压缩质量
该过程完成后停止记录
在开始/停止时播放声音
录制开始和结束时播放声音
该应用程序使用所有者的身份来获取有关所有者计划，输入许可证等的信息。 您可以与所有计算机用户共享所有者。
扩展计算机激活将在新的时间段内将活动许可证锁定到该计算机。
如果启用，该应用程序将自动扩展对此计算机的计算机激活。 您也可以在我的个人资料中禁用自动扩展。
输入将执行的' path \ filename arguments'字符串。 使用$(stat)读取过程数据或使用$Get(key)读取应用程序配置。
' postprocess.exe'在场景$(sceneName)上的$(processDuration:d)秒内，进程$(processId)的代码为$(processResult)的完成'
Enter a valid email address where the app will send the notification email.
Define a notification email template file.
Define a sound theme for successful and failed processes.
仅当过程工具的值大于最小持续时间时才调用该动作。
定义一个/任何过程完成后要执行的动作。
Enable or disable application log file 'RealityScan.log' in the system temp folder.
Automatically open a Help window for each tool.
鼠标，键盘图和导航样式。
Maximal count of 3D points to display in a 3D view.
Automatically clear the cache when the application exits.
Reset the application layout and dialogs.
What should happen when a process is complete.
Set up the screen grabbing system.
Load or save the global settings.
启用或禁用淡入/淡出动画效果，例如 以获得更快的远程访问体验。
Set up the application language, visual style, and behavior.
Set up the application rendering settings.
如果您打算长时间离线，请单击'充值'以确保最大可能的激活时间。
Use Exif if both XMP and Exif contains the same type of information.
Automatically save project during processing to increase robustness to unexpected failures.

A weight balancing a strenth between 2D and 3D priors in alignment computation. For a very accurate depth-maps, like from hand-held profesional scanners, use weight 1. The setting can be defined per input or globaly.
Specify a range, in the coordinate system units, where the calculated value should be considered as an equal to the prior value.
Specify an angular range, where the calculated value should be considered as equal to the prior value.
The greater value causes calculated value to be closer to the prior value even at the cost of losing visual connections.
使用相机先前值进行地理配准
Enable image position priors for ground controls.
Allow the use of GPU acceleration to speed up the calculation.
Start the feature detector in the background immediately after adding images.
Thread priority for background feature detection.
Use mosaic images as feature source during .zfprj LiDAR import
Increases chance of aligning the LiDAR scan with images due to increased number of mutually found features. Set Features source to Color to enable it.
即使没有通过连接点连接，也将地理参照的部件合并在一起。
每百万像素(mpx)的最大特征
调整默认设置，设置参数中包含了相机，控制点等项目的先前值参数。
Setup reference prior value representing usual accuary of distance constaints.
选择是使用自定义精度值 或是使用在对齐设置中预先定义的全局相机事先设定。
从文件并编辑缺失的定义
Changing preferences of using mosaic images as feature source does not affect already imported .zfprj LiDAR scans
Enable or disable brightness enhancing during placing control point into images.
Pixel brightness multiplication factor, e.g., set to two to make image two 2 times brighter.
A number of levels of shades which should be added to the image.
Define which part of the image should be used for finding optimal brithgness and contrast. When smaller regions is used, then the image outside of the region can be too bright or too dark.
Limit the maximal change of brightness in both positive (leading to a brighter image) or negative direction (making the image darker).
Limit the maximal autodetected contrast to this value.
If enabled, view brightness and contrast will be adjusted.
Switch between manual and automatic brightness and contrast control.
Wider cross-hair region (33% of the view)
Maximum number of features per megapixel.
Maximum number of features per image.
Factor by which the size of an image is reduced before feature detection.
Number of detected features that will be used in alignment.
Factor by which the size of an image is reduced before feature detection.
Select the version of the algorithm to use for calculating depth maps.
深度图计算设置。 模型计算的第一部分是每个图像的深度图计算。
如果您的计算机中有多个GPU，则可以在此处选择要使用的GPU。
仅当您选择预览质量模型计算时，才会应用这些设置。
以此比例缩小的图像将用于深度图计算，而不是图像的原始分辨率。数字越大，计算速度越快，但导致细节降低。
图像(缩小后)必须至少包含此百万像素数
An image (after downscale) must contain no more than this number of megapixels.
A mark of quality level for the cache reusability from other details.
这些设置仅在您选择常规质量模型计算时才适用
即使您选择高质量的模型计算，也将应用这些设置
These settings are applied when a LiDAR scan is being used during a model computation.

Use this setting to restrict the maximal density of the LiDAR point cloud. For TLS, this reduces density of points
closer to the LiDAR station. However, this value does not affect model creation from images (photogrammetry).
Use "Mesh calculation\Minimal distance between two vertices" to control the overall density of the final model.
在计算深度图之后创建网格。 使用这些参数来控制最终网格的属性。
两个顶点之间的最小距离
设置模型的最终密度。请注意，该值相对于模型比例；因此，当场景未经度量校准时，场景之间的值可能会有所不同。别忘了在下一个项目的另一个模型计算之前，相应地更改它。
These settings are applied just if you select preview quality model computation (single part).
Use the point cloud from alignment instead of depth-map calculation.
The maximal number of vertices in a model.
Compute geometry with the specified detail.
Pick a calculation strategy for preview mesh. Use sparse point cloud for fastest results.
Remove the triangles lying on the surface of the reconstruction region.
每个部件的最大顶点数
The maximal number of vertices in a part.
首选的详细程度。 使用较高的数字表示较低的细节，即使用较小的三角形。
我们不建议修改这些设置
A smoothing factor for samples near mesh cracks.
A path of intermediate results of meshing.
Allow the use of GPU acceleration to speed up the calculation.
使用传统简化算法来简化模型。
How worse are depth maps from images compared to LiDAR points.
低纹理区域的采样密度。
Factor defining the amount of noise on a mesh. A higher value defines a higher amount of noise and creates a smoother mesh.
低纹理区域的噪声水平(由芯片噪声引起)。
A filter radius used in depth-map calculation.
Filter strength used in the depth-map calculation.
每个部件的最大顶点数
部件中的最大顶点数。 导入的模型将分为几个部分以满足这些条件。
An image index which is used as a reference for normalization.
当模型没有纹理并按下'纹理'按钮时，用于解开模型的默认解开参数。
如果三角形的边缘大于(值)*(平均边缘长度)，则三角形将以一个纹理像素纹理化。
设置由解包算法生成的最大纹理数量。
A coordinate system used for the current tool.
Units in the current coordinate system.
Value of the custom texel size.
模型的任何部分都不会使用较低的纹理像素大小进行纹理处理。
所需的最大纹理元素尺寸
没有模型部件将具有较大的纹理像素纹理。
导入模型的默认纹理分辨率
在纹理化之前缩小图像
纹理化后重新着色模型
Perform coloring from texturing after texturing.
Simplify to the target number of triangles.
Simplify to the target percentage of triangles.
Simplify to that number of triangles which is greater from the absolute target number and the target number defined by the percentage.
您可以选择自动使用最佳纹理元素尺寸(或其倍数)或自定义纹理元素尺寸。 纹理元素尺寸越大，纹理分辨率越小。
您可以选择自动使用最小纹理元素尺寸(或其倍数)或自定义纹理元素尺寸。 最小纹理元素尺寸越大，纹理分辨率越小。
所需的最大纹理元素尺寸
您可以选择自动使用最大纹理元素尺寸(或其倍数)或自定义纹理元素尺寸。
对齐后会自动创建重建区域。
自动补偿所选组件中所有图像的颜色，亮度和对比度的差异。
Generate as many textures as needed to achieve the desired texture quality
将来自默认音频源的音频记录到视频中。
Set the minimum dimensions of the textures generated by the unwrap algorithm.
Resolution of the texture used after the model is unwrapped for reprojection.
Simplify to that number of triangles which is lower from the absolute target number and the target number defined by the percentage.
Max triangles to display (Max GPU memory)
Choose 20% of GPU memory option for performance or 80% for high triangle count but possibly poor performance of the UI.
Selects the largest model component, inverts selection and removes selected triangles.
Smooth down rough surfaces of a model.
Mask background of images using AI.
Transfer color from source model to the simplified model.
Store source model normal direction into simplified model normal texture.
Store image location relative to the project file location.
Setup the default behavious of importers and exporters.

如果您要使替代图像源不失真，请使用此选项。 原始图像名称将带有后缀。
例如:如果后缀为' _hdr.tiff'，则图像_DSC198_hdr.tiff将不失真(而不是原始的_DSC198.jpg)。 如果后缀图像不存在，则将使用原始图像。

这将消除表面的噪声，并使三角剖分在平滑表面上更规则，而在边缘上更密集。
这将使模型更平滑，也可以使细节平滑。

Defines the overall strength of smoothing.

Select a folder, camera rigs will be identified from images in the folder and its subfolders.
Select an image list, camera rigs will be defined from it.
Number of cameras in each rig instance.
Rigs are formed from n-tuples of images, e.g. (image1, image2, image3), (image4, image5, image6), ... the rig size defines the count of images in each n-tuple.
Cameras will be grouped according to the file order.
Method for assigning images to a physical camera in the rig.
Images will be paired with cameras on a rig according to this rule, e.g. images with the same name will be understood as the same camera.

Rigs are recognized using a user-defined pattern consisting of (1) rig - defining camera mount configuration, (2) a pose - defining each set of captured photos using the rig, and (3) pairs image with a physical camera, i.e. camera index in the camera mount.
Group images using a pattern applied to filename.
Camera rigs will be defined from all imported images.
Camera rigs will be defined from a selection of imported images.
Selected files will be mapped to rigs, rig poses and physical camera slots using this method.

我们发现'重建\设置\网格计算\标准模型\细节抽取系数'默认为1.0.2.2018版的2.0。
此错误导致在'标准质量'中计算的模型包含的三角形较少，并且细节比我们默认的要低。因此，我们已经将这个设置更新回原来的默认值1。
如果你没有改变这个设置，那么正常质量模型从现在开始将会更详细，并且处理可以花费大约25%的时间。 如果您希望保留相同的行为，则需要手动将该值设置为2.0。
如果您手动更改了该设置，则不会更改该设置，您可以忽略此消息。

In this version we allow you to export your creation in return for some statistics. The collected statistics are anonymous and contain just a few numeric values, like the count of images, size of 3D models, running times and the used memory statistics. They do not include your private, image or 3D mesh information. Help us making RealityScan even better.

Define access to folders which should be shared in connected devices.

A semicolon separated list of folders which can be accessed by all connected devices.
This is typically list of shared dataset folders but can be blank. RSNode session sand-box is always accessible.

A semicolon separated list of folders where connected devices can read, export or rewrite files.
This is typically a place where result are exported. RSNode session output folder is added automatically.
Enable sending data using Internet if it is not possible to use local connection.

计算和导出详细模型的级别
Contains settings specific to the Level-of-Detail process.
Contains settings specific to the Mesh export.
A threshold for the level-of-detail process, when met, the process stops.
A number of triangles for the first level-of-detail model, can be anything between 1 up to a number of triangles in the selected model.
A type of criterion which controls how many level-of-detail models will be generated.
An explicit number of level-of-detail models that will be generated.
The last level-of-detail model will contain this number of triangles.
A type of the simplification algorithm used for generating level-of-detail models.
Simplifies each model by relative factor.
Simplifies models in such a way that the last level-of-detail model contains the entered number of triangles.

Cannot use depth layer in meshing, because component is non-metric (its scale doesn't necessarily match real-world dimensions). To get a metric component, use e.g. camera pose priors or use depth layer in alignment.
The chosen image layer was missing for some of the images. Instead, the geometry image layer was exported.
Some images were not aligned. This may be due to motion blur or slight exposure issues.
Images were aligned into multiple components, likely due to weak overlap or not enough common features.
Alignment completed, but the result has low quality. This may be caused by missing or undetectable features in the images.
Images failed to align, and no component was created. This may be caused by undetectable features, poor overlap, or incorrect camera positions.
The bounding box scale (AABB) uses smaller values for small objects and larger values for big scenes. Higher scales may require more memory.

No images were found in the project. These are necessary when creating virtual cameras "from camera priors" or "from component".

  • To use camera priors for virtual cameras, import images with known camera poses.
  • To use camera poses from a component, images have to be aligned into a georeferenced component.
  • Otherwise, use the "Generate aerial poses" option.

The images in the project do not have known camera poses. These are necessary when creating virtual cameras "from camera priors". If you want to create virtual cameras differently:

  • To use camera poses from a component, images have to be aligned into a georeferenced component.
  • Otherwise, use the "Generate aerial poses" option.

The camera poses or component are not in the same coordinate system as the LiDAR scan, or they do not share the same location. Check the coordinate system setting and ensure they overlap before proceeding.

Some of the imported LiDAR scans produced no valid virtual images.

$(skippedInputsList)
If yes, merges the inputs into a single LiDAR scan. If no, processes the inputs separately.
Ignores columns not present in the input file.
Set the height of virtual cameras above the reference height (in the units of the selected coordinate system).
Set the angle for additional off-nadir cameras around the main nadir camera. If set to zero, only the nadir camera is created.

Higher values mean denser grid, lower values mean sparser grid.
The LiDAR type was changed from the default set based on the file format. This may lead to unexpected results if the original type was correct. Change the type only if the default was incorrect.
Could not create virtual cameras, because we couldn't find an image that is both georeferenced and is enabled for alignment. (LiDAR images are always ignored.)
Could not create virtual cameras, because the component is either empty or all its images are disabled for alignment. (LiDAR images are always ignored.)
Could not derive virtual cameras from the specified component, because that component is not georeferenced.
Could not create virtual cameras, because specified component does not exist.
Cannot produce virtual images in intensity, because either the pointcloud has no (known) intensity channel, or all points have the same intensity.
Cannot produce virtual images in color, because the pointcloud has no (known) color channels.
You're trying to process both ordered and unordered pointclouds in one batch. Different point cloud types have to be processed separately.
Unsupported pointcloud type for the given file format.
No virtual images were generated, because no features could be detected.
Could not generate virtual cameras on a top-down grid -- the grid was too large (more than 100 000 cameras). Did you set the altitude correctly?
Define how the virtual cameras will be created.
Defines the reference height for virtual cameras as local (points below the camera), global (entire scan), or best-fit plane.
Could not estimate texel size, because the component's sparse point cloud is empty. Try running alignment again.

The imported COLMAP project does not contain any 3D points, which are required to generate a sparse point cloud. Without a sparse point cloud, key features in RealityScan such as meshing, unwrapping, and texturing will not function properly.

The imported BundleOut project does not contain any 3D points, which are required to generate a sparse point cloud. Without a sparse point cloud, key features in RealityScan such as meshing, unwrapping, and texturing will not function properly.
Mask generation switched from GPU acceleration to CPU for compatibility reasons.

The virtual cameras do not see the LiDAR scan too well. If you created virtual cameras from camera priors, try adjusting the focal length priors of those cameras. If you generated virtual cameras in a top-down grid, try adjusting the altitude.
Points that have been classified, but that do not fall into any category from the list above.
LAS classification format does not define a standard mapping from color to labels.

Some of the .LSP files are from old versions and do not have the original intensity range stored, so it is impossible to set the 'Minimal intensity' in meshing. Either set the 'Minimal intensity' setting to 0, or regenerate the LSPs and run the whole workflow again.
Import of classification has been requested by user, but the imported point cloud has no classification.

In addition to generating a camera for the given camera pose, generate 4 sideways looking cameras. These cameras have the same position; they differ only in their orientation. Relative to the main camera, they are looking up / down / left / right; the angle is specified by user.
Generates six cameras that cover the entire 360° view. Ignores the source camera's intrinsics (i.e. uses some fixed values, though resolution scales with source camera resolution).
For each source camera pose, a cluster of cameras is generated. This setting determines what cluster.
